2604.06746.title: StructKV: Preserving the Structural Skeleton for Scalable Long-Context Inference
2604.06746.paper_summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) scale to support context windows exceeding one million tokens, the linear growth of Key-Value (KV) cache imposes severe memory capacity and bandwidth bottlenecks, constraining the efficiency of long-context inference. Existing compression approaches typically prioritize tokens based on local saliency metrics to decouple prefill computation from decoding memory. However, these methods often rely on local saliency snapshots at a specific layer, thereby systematically discarding tokens that act as global information hubs across the network depth but appear temporarily dormant at the specific layer selected for pruning. To address this limitation, we propose StructKV, a structure-aware KV cache compression framework that introduces three core innovations: First, Global In-Degree Centrality aggregates attention patterns across the network depth to identify global information hubs. Second, Dynamic Pivot Detection utilizes information-theoretic metrics to adaptively locate the optimal layer for compression. Finally, Structural Propagation and Decoupling separates the computational budget from the memory storage budget. Experimental results on the LongBench and RULER benchmarks demonstrate that StructKV effectively preserves long-range dependencies and retrieval robustness.
2604.06746.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）擴展以支持超過一百萬個標記的上下文窗口，鍵值（KV）快取的線性增長對記憶體容量和帶寬造成了嚴重的瓶頸，限制了長上下文推理的效率。現有的壓縮方法通常根據局部顯著性指標來優先考慮標記，以將預填計算與解碼記憶體解耦。然而，這些方法往往依賴於特定層的局部顯著性快照，因此系統性地丟棄了在網絡深度中作為全球信息樞紐的標記，而這些標記在選定的修剪層中看似暫時處於休眠狀態。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了StructKV，一種結構感知的KV快取壓縮框架，該框架引入了三項核心創新：首先，全球入度中心性聚合了網絡深度中的注意力模式，以識別全球信息樞紐。其次，動態樞紐檢測利用信息論指標自適應地定位最佳壓縮層。最後，結構傳播和解耦將計算預算與記憶體存儲預算分開。在LongBench和RULER基準上的實驗結果表明，StructKV有效地保留了長距離依賴性和檢索穩健性。
2604.06746.author: Zhirui Chen et.al.
2604.06746.authors: Zhirui Chen, Peiyang Liu, Ling Shao
